summary: Iteration 11 testing - New features for Vasilis NetShield platform. Backend APIs working correctly. UI mostly functional with one RBAC bug.

integration_issues.issue: Content section visible to org_admin users. According to requirements, Content should only be visible to super_admin and media_manager. Line 256 in App.js includes org_admin in canManageContent.

RBAC_Settings_section.details: Settings section correctly hidden for org_admin, visible for super_admin

RBAC_Content_section.details: Content section visible to org_admin which should be restricted to super_admin and media_manager only

Click_Details_in_Advanced_Analytics.details: API endpoint /api/phishing/click-details works. UI shows 'Users Who Clicked Phishing Links' section with columns for user_name, email, organization

Best_Performing_Campaigns.details: API endpoint /api/phishing/best-performing works. UI shows 'Best Performing Campaigns' section with correct data

Duplicate_Campaign_Button.details: Duplicate button visible on campaign cards. API /api/phishing/campaigns/{id}/duplicate works. Creates copy with '(Copy)' suffix

Audit_Logs_user_name_column.details: Audit logs table shows User column with actual user names (e.g., 'KINGSLEY IHESIENE'). Headers: Timestamp, Action, User, Email, IP Address, Country, Severity

Scenario_Manager_10_types.details: All 10 simulation types available in dropdown: Phishing Email, Malicious Ad, Social Engineering, QR Code Phishing, USB Drop Attack, MFA Fatigue Attack, Business Email Compromise, Data Handling Trap, Ransomware Readiness, Shadow IT Detection

Phishing_Stats_Endpoint.details: API /api/phishing/stats returns all required fields including total_campaigns, open_rate, click_rate, etc.

action_items: Fix RBAC for Content section: Remove org_admin from canManageContent in /app/frontend/src/App.js line 256. Change from 'user?.role === "super_admin" || user?.role === "org_admin" || user?.role === "media_manager"' to 'user?.role === "super_admin" || user?.role === "media_manager"'
critical_code_review_comments: Line 256 in App.js incorrectly grants canManageContent permission to org_admin users
seed_data_creation: Created test campaigns for duplicate functionality testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are implemented and working. One RBAC bug: Content section visible to org_admin. Test credentials: super_admin=kingsley@vasilisnetshield.com/Test123!, org_admin=orgadmin@test.com/Test123!. Test campaigns created: TEST_Duplicate_Campaign and copies.
